features: 【Complete blade head, easy to replace】This product is an integrated blade head belt base assembly. No need to replace the blade. Simply remove the old head and install the product onto it.

【Stainless steel material, smooth shavin】The double-layer stainless steel blades perfectly fit the skin, smooth shaving, easily take away short stubble, do not harm the skin, and bring you a good shaving experience
【 Usage time and blade sharpness 】 This product uses a new double-layer stainless steel blade. To ensure your shaving experience, please replace the shaver head within 12 months.

【 After sales packaging 】 The package contains 1 replacement shaver head and 1 brush. If you have any questions after receiving the product, please contact us in a timely manner and we will give you a satisfactory answer!
